content: submitted the project 2 minutes before the deadline. you can't rush quality.
finally understood how the DOM works. why did no one explain it this clearly before
this project deserves an A for sure. i spent more time on it than i spent sleeping this week.
css grid is so much easier than i expected. why was i using tables my whole life
Dr. Fadi is a very kind man, God bless him.
Türkiye çok güzel bir ülke. Tekrar Trabzon'a gitmek istiyorum, harika bir deneyimdi
I am very scared from the Web Dev Final. someone please hold my hand
stayed up until 4am fixing one bug. turns out i forgot a semicolon. i am fine. everything is fine.
my laptop fan sounds like a helicopter during compilation. she's been through a lot this semester.
the library is fully booked during finals week and i am not surprised at all. zero surprised.
asked chatgpt to explain recursion. it explained recursion by explaining recursion. poetic.
group project update: i did everything. the group project was a solo project. as always.
just learned what async/await actually does. i have been using it wrong for 3 months. moving on.
studied for 6 hours straight. retained approximately nothing. the brain is a cruel device.
reminder that the semester is almost over and none of us are ready. we are in this together.
